commit.subject: LU-18336 tests: restore max_read_ahead_whole_mb correctly
commit.message:
LU-18336 tests: restore max_read_ahead_whole_mb correctly

Restore max_read_ahead_whole_mb value correctly in conf-sanity.sh
test_28A, otherwise it may cause test_30a failure.

Fixes: 1a9be0046b1 ("LU-11526 rpc: support maximum 64MB I/O RPC")
Signed-off-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I62c8c680ea2bcd2b36904974c76921956b1869fe
